subject: CORS Fixed - test.tangotiempo.com now allowed
body:
Sarah,

CORS issue is fixed on calendarbeaf-prod.

## Added Origins
- https://test.tangotiempo.com ✅
- http://localhost:3001 ✅

## Verified
```
curl -X OPTIONS 'https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/events' \
  -H 'Origin: https://test.tangotiempo.com'

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://test.tangotiempo.com
```

You should be unblocked for TEST environment testing now.

- Fulton
